# AntiForget

> AI-powered spaced repetition and active recall platform for long-term knowledge retention.

AntiForget is a free, open-source web application that helps learners master complex subjects through AI-assisted knowledge distillation, visual knowledge graphs, and Socratic review sessions backed by the FSRS spaced repetition algorithm.

## What AntiForget Does

- **Distillation Tray**: Upload source documents (PDF, DOCX, plain text) and let AI distill them into concise, actionable summaries and topic cards.
- **Knowledge Graph**: A visual, interactive graph that maps connections between topics, tags, and ideas so learners see the "big picture" of what they know.
- **Socratic Arena**: AI-driven review sessions that simulate oral exams and deep questioning to test understanding — not just memorization.
- **FSRS Spaced Repetition**: Implements the Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler (FSRS) algorithm to schedule reviews at optimal intervals, maximizing long-term retention with minimum study time.
- **Secure Authentication**: Supports Google OAuth 2.0 and Passkeys (WebAuthn) for passwordless sign-in.
- **Cloud Storage**: Stores uploaded files via Google Drive integration.

## Who It Is For

Students, researchers, professionals, and lifelong learners who want to move beyond passive re-reading and build durable, structured knowledge.

## Technology

- Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Express.js (Node.js), PostgreSQL
- AI Providers: Gemini, Groq, Mistral, NVIDIA, OpenRouter, Puter.js
- Algorithm: FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler)
